# Q8 CORE — out/in ratio via divide(to float), flag ratio>threshold (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q8 CORE — out/in ratio via divide(to float), flag ratio>threshold.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | comp sum(bytes_out) as total_out, sum(bytes_in) as total_in by host | filter total_in > 0 | alter ratio = divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(total_in)) | alter ratio_x100 = round(multiply(ratio, 100)) | filter ratio > 50 | sort desc ratio | fields host, total_out, total_in, ratio, ratio_x100
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
